\tzpentry{ID4298}{Magnetic Helicity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4298 introduces Magnetic Helicity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{M} = SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3 \times \mathfrak{so}(3)^*$
\]
